The question is asking to determine the number of years where the playoffs outcome was "did not qualify". Since each row represents a year and its playoff status, and the "playoffs" column indicates the outcome, we need to group by the "playoffs" column to count the occurrences of "did not qualify". We can use the f_group_column(playoffs) operation to group the years based on their playoff outcome to analyze this situation.
The number of years that the playoffs did not qualify is 2, as shown in both rows of the table where the playoffs column indicates "did not qualify" for the years 1936/37 and 1938/39.
